explanation.description: For super, gives explanation about the source

updatedAt.description: Date of the last update of the note

sources.description: Array of sources that were used to answer the question

enum: You've reached the api rate limit. Please wait and retry later.

nbPages.description: Total number of pages for the current query

page.description: Current page number of the search pagination

groupId.description: Group id of the owner (if owner is a group)

userId.description: User id of the owner (if owner is a user)

NoteOwner.description:
Owner of the note for review purposes.
Either userId or groupId will be set, but not both.

owner.description:
Owner of the note for review purposes.
Either userId or groupId will be set, but not both.
If no owner is set, this field will be omitted.

reviewState.description:
Review state of the note
Can be Verified, Outdated, VerificationRequested or VerificationExpired

archivedAt.description: Date of the archiving of the note (null if not archived)

lastEditedAt.description: Date of the last edition of the note

updatedAt.description: Date of the last update of the note

createdAt.description: Date of the creation of the note

columns.description: If note is in a collection, it will contain its column names

attributes.description:
If note is in a collection, it will contain its attributes ordered
by column

parentNoteId.description:
Parent note id of the current note.
It can be null if it's a root note.

iconColor.description: Optional icon color for the note.

iconShape.description: Optional icon identifier for the note.

hasNextPage.description: Is there any other page to fetch

nextCursor.description: Next cursor to continue fetching the paginate children

email.description: Email address of the authenticated user.

organizationDomain.description: Domain of the organization the authenticated user belongs to.

organizationName.description: Name of the organization the authenticated user belongs to.

displayName.description: Display name of the authenticated user.

content.description: Content of the note in Markdown, Html, or SliteML

parentNotes.description:
Breadcrumb of the note
The first element is the channel

reviewState.description:
Review state of the note
Can be Verified, Outdated, VerificationRequested or VerificationExpired

highlight.description:
Part of the note that matched the query.
If an empty string is returned, it means only the title matched.

type.description:
Type of the note
It can be a collection, a discussion or a default rich_text.

isGuest.description: Whether the user is a guest

info.title: Public Slite api
info.description: Access your Slite documents, search, create, update...

get.description:
Ask a question to your notes in natural language.
The scope of the notes used to answer the question is restricted to the authenticated user.
Various optional filters are available to restrict the scope of the notes even more.

parameters.description: Question to ask on your notes
parameters.name: question

parameters.description: Optional filter to only return notes under this parent note id
parameters.name: parentNoteId

parameters.description: Optional filter to use a specific assistant for super only
parameters.name: assistantId

rootId.description: Root id of the object to gather sources from. This should be created from the UI as a new custom data source.

title.description: Title of the object to index

content.description: Content of the object to index

type.description: Type of the object to index. Can be "markdown" or "html"

updatedAt.description: Last update date of the object to index. Used to determine the freshness of the object.

url.description: Url of the object to index. Used to redirect to the proper page.

post.description:
Create a note from markdown content, with a templateId or just an empty one.
If no parentNoteId is specified, it will be created in your personal channel.

title.description: Title of the note to create

parentNoteId.description:
Below which other note to create this note.
If not specified, the note would be created in your personal channel

templateId.description: If you want to apply a template to the created note

markdown.description: Either provide Markdown content to fill the note

html.description: Or you can provide HTML content

attributes.description:
Attributes for the parent collection ordered by column.
If they don't match the appropriate type, they would be ignored

value.title: Slite interconnection
value.content:
# How the public api works?

The public api consist of few simple REST route exposed via openapi standard.

value.title: Slite collection
value.content:
# How can we reach the collection attributes?

They will be returned ordered in an `attributes` array.

parameters.description: Note id to return
parameters.name: noteId

parameters.description: Format of the content to return (Markdown, Html, or SliteML)
parameters.name: format

parameters.description: Note id to delete
parameters.name: noteId

html.description: New html content to fill the note

Attributes for the parent collection ordered by column.
If they don't match the appropriate type, they would be ignored

parameters.name: noteId

archived.description: Set to true to archive the note, false to unarchive it

put.description: Update the owner of a note, it can be a user or a group

parameters.name: noteId

userId.description: User id to set as the owner of the note

groupId.description: Group id to set as the owner of the note

url.description: Direct url of the tile in the note

put.description:
Update or create tile.
A tile is rendered with a structured header and a markdown content.
You can create a tile by copying a tile id from Slite by clicking on `Copy block id` on an empty line setting in the editor.
put.summary: Update a tile in a note

parameters.description: Note id containing the tile id
parameters.name: noteId

parameters.description: Tile id to update
parameters.name: tileId

iconURL.description: Icon URL to show in the tile

status.description: If needed a tile status can be specified with its color

url.description: The tile can be linked to an external URL

content.description: The content of the tile. Can be in markdown.

hits.highlight: ...easily connect Slite to your own process, you can use Slite public api to perform search...
hits.title: Slite interconnection

get.description:
Search notes based on a query.
The scope of the notes is restricted to the authenticated user.
Various optional filters are available to restrict the scope of the search even more.

parameters.description: Query used to perform the note search, default to empty string
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: Optional filter to only return notes under this parent note id
parameters.name: parentNoteId

parameters.description: Optional filter to only return notes with a depth (number of parents) equal to a specified value
parameters.name: depth

parameters.description:
Optional filter to return notes in a special review state
Can be Verified, Outdated, VerificationRequested or VerificationExpired
parameters.name: reviewState

parameters.description: Used to perform pagination on search
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Specify how many notes to return per page
parameters.name: hitsPerPage

parameters.description: Inject a tag before the matching query
parameters.name: highlightPreTag

parameters.description: Inject a tag after the matching query
parameters.name: highlightPostTag

parameters.description: Optional filter to only return notes edited after a specific date
parameters.name: lastEditedAfter

parameters.description: Optional filter to only return notes where metadata has changed after a specific date
parameters.name: lastUpdatedAfter

parameters.description: Optional filter to also include archived notes in the search results (default to false)
parameters.name: includeArchived

parameters.description: User ID to retrieve
parameters.name: userId

get.description: Search for users by email, name, or username

parameters.description: Search query to match against email, display name
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: Include archived users in the search results
parameters.name: includeArchived

parameters.description: Cursor to use to continue fetching users
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.name: groupId

groups.name: Developers
